# AI Wiki

> Repo-backed wiki for humans and AI agents.

Prefer the static registry and generated agent manifests for machine access. Human readers can start at `/wiki/?s=devops&p=index`.

## Agent Entry Points

- Registry: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StevenBuglione/wiki-data-registry@main/sources.json
- Agent registry: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StevenBuglione/wiki-data-registry@main/agent-sources.json
- Wiki agent card: /.well-known/wiki-agent.json
- Browser agent tools: /agents/

## Sources

- DevOps: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StevenBuglione/wiki-data-devops@published/latest-agent.json
- Homelab: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StevenBuglione/wiki-data-homelab@published/latest-agent.json
- Projects: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StevenBuglione/wiki-data-projects@published/latest-agent.json
